chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-825 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For non prosecution. ------ 02.10.2025 Mr. Abdul Wajid Khokhar, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------ Learned counsel for the petitioner under the specific instructions does not wish to press instant petition by submitting that the purpose of filing of instant petition has been served. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge Manzoor
